---
title: "Moving Public Diplomacy Research Forward: Methodological Approaches"
date: 2022-04
author:
  - name: Kadir Jun Ayhan
    url: https://kjayhan.github.io
    orcid: 0000-0001-8052-1938
    affiliation: Ewha Womans University Graduate School of International Studies
  - name: Efe Sevin
    url: https://linktr.ee/efesevin
    orcid: 0000-0002-7837-5000
    affiliation: Towson University
categories: [Scopus, public diplomacy, 2022]
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    <strong>Kadir Jun Ayhan</strong> and Efe Sevin* (2022), “Moving Public Diplomacy Research Forward: Methodological Approaches,” <em>Place Branding and Public Diplomacy</em>: 18(3): 201-203, doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1057/s41254-022-00263-5"><code>10.1057/s41254-022-00263-5</code></a>
doi: 10.1057/s41254-022-00263-5
#image:
#draft: true
---

## Introduction

Public diplomacy studies have been playing "catch-up" with public diplomacy practice. While we can trace the practice with the proper public diplomacy label to 1965 and to even further back to the late 1800s without the label, academic works have been limited until the last two decades. Up until 2001, fewer than 10 articles on public diplomacy were published annually. Currently, we have at least two peer-reviewed journals dedicated to public diplomacy studies, Public Diplomacy and Place Branding and Journal of Public Diplomacy, alongside numerous research centers and graduate programs.

...\

## BibTeX citation

``` bibtex
@article{ayhan_moving_2022,
    title = {Moving public diplomacy research forward: methodological approaches},
    volume = {18},
    issn = {1751-8059},
    doi = {10.1057/s41254-022-00263-5},
    pages = {201--203},
    number = {3},
    journaltitle = {Place Branding and Public Diplomacy},
    author = {Ayhan, Kadir Jun and Sevin, Efe},
    date = {2022},
    note = {Type: Journal Article},
}
```
